repo.description: The most widely used Python to C compiler
repo.name: cython

body:
This does a few things:
* Adds a `--no-compile` argument to `runtests.py` to let you go through the test suite without recompiling anything but just rerunning the tests.
* Rerun the tests on higher Python versions in the CI for the Limited API jobs.

commit.message:
Add an option to run runtests without compiling

The intention is to use this to test the Limited API more
thoroughly, by rerunning the tests in a higher version.
Try to test limited API on higher versions
Try a condition rather than relying on an empty loop
Cut down matrix for the sake of quicker testing
Revertme - hugely cutdown list of tests
Revert me - turn off regular run
Try to find out what RUNTEST_ARGS actually is
Make it global so it works on 3.14
Fix parallel on some py versions
Undo restriction to a small number of tests
